servicesLending.heading: Wedding financing
servicesLending.subtitle: Compare loan offers from RBI-regulated lenders for your wedding plans.

previewBanner.title: Not live yet — preview.
previewBanner.description: Wedding financing is shown for preview only and is not available until our RBI-compliant lending partner is live. No application is submitted and no data leaves Smart Shaadi.

disclosure.title: Smart Shaadi is a Loan Service Provider (LSP), not the lender.
disclosure.description: We only surface offers from RBI-regulated lenders. Loans are provided by the lender named on each offer.
disclosure.detail: Funds are disbursed directly to your bank account and repayments go directly to the lender. Smart Shaadi never handles your money.

servicesLending.successDescription: We've noted your consent. When our lending partner is live you'll be referred with a Key Fact Statement before any agreement.
servicesLending.noOffers: No offers to show right now.
servicesLending.consentText: I consent to Smart Shaadi sharing the details needed to refer me to the selected lender. I understand Smart Shaadi is an LSP, earns a referral fee from the lender, and never collects interest or handles my money.

servicesInsurance.heading: Insurance for your big day
servicesInsurance.subtitle: Compare cover from IRDAI-registered insurers — health, life, travel, and wedding-event protection.

previewBanner.title: Not live yet — preview.
previewBanner.description: Insurance is shown for preview only and is not available until our IRDAI-compliant partner is live. No application is submitted and no data leaves Smart Shaadi.

disclosure.title: Smart Shaadi refers you to IRDAI-registered insurers.
disclosure.description: Cover is provided by the insurer named on each quote — Smart Shaadi is not the insurer and earns a referral fee, never your premium.
disclosure.detail: We lead with standard health cover; life, travel, and wedding-event protection are also available.

servicesInsurance.successDescription: We've noted your consent. When our insurance partner is live you'll be referred to the insurer with full policy disclosures.
servicesInsurance.noQuotes: No quotes to show right now.
servicesInsurance.consentText: I consent to Smart Shaadi sharing the details needed to refer me to the selected insurer. I understand Smart Shaadi is a referrer, earns a referral fee, and does not collect my premium.
